titleEn: From novelty to necessity: Why tulip growers are betting on robotic disease selection
titleZh: 从新奇到必需：郁金香种植者为何押注机器人病害筛选
summaryZh: 本文报道了H2L Selector机器人在郁金香种植中的应用进展。该机器人能够识别并处理花床中的病害郁金香，已售出139台，用户平均评分4.1/5。尽管机器人已走出实验阶段，但种植者强调，广泛采用仍需在可靠性和性能上进一步改进。文章采访了四位用户，总体反馈积极。
featuredReason: 虽然本文聚焦花卉种植，但机器人病害筛选技术对智慧畜牧中的动物健康监测、自动化巡检具有跨领域借鉴意义，展示了AI视觉+机器人从实验到商业化的路径。
contentFull: Buyers guides Field robots Autosteer retrofit kits Autonomous Retrofit Kits Autonomous Tractors Drones Smart weeders Tech in focus Autonomoussemi-auto steering systems Field robots Drones Smart farming Indoor farming Tools & data Sustainability Crop solutions Fertilizing Tillage WeedPest control Irrigation Harvest & storage Digital magazine Newsletter Our sites Subscribe LoginRegister Subscribe Partners Newsletter Subscribe ![Image 2: login!Image 3: logout](https:www.futurefarming.comsmart-farmingfrom-novelty-to-necessity-why-tulip-growers-are-betting-on-robotic-disease-selection) ![Image 4: Future Farming](https:www.futurefarming.com) Buyers guides Field robots Autonomous Tractors Autonomous Retrofit Kits Autosteer Retrofit Kits Drones Smart weeders Tech in focus Drones Field robots Autonomoussemi-auto steering systems Crop solutions Fertilizing Tillage WeedPest control Irrigation Harvest & storage Smart farming Indoor farming Tools & data Sustainability ![Image 5](https:www.futurefarming.comsmart-farmingfrom-novelty-to-necessity-why-tulip-growers-are-betting-on-robotic-disease-selection) Logout Gateway to the world of smart farming From novelty to necessity: Why tulip growers are betting on robotic disease selection 16-06 | Smart farming | Article LinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrint !Image 6: The H2L Selector The H2L Selector 180 and its larger brother, the 225, are robots that recognise and treat diseased tulips in the beds. The robots have working widths of 180 and 225 cm respectively and are produced exclusively for tulip growing. H2L has now sold 139 of them. The H2L Selector has moved beyond the experimental stage. With 139 machines sold and users giving it an average score of 4.1 out of 5, robotic disease selection is becoming mainstream in tulip production. Yet growers stress that widespread adoption will depend on further improvements in reliability and performance. Future Farming asked 4 users of the H2L Selector 180 about their experiences with the robot. translationZh:
H2L Selector 180及其更大的兄弟机型225，是能够识别并处理花床中病害郁金香的机器人。这两款机器人的作业宽度分别为180厘米和225厘米，专为郁金香种植生产。H2L目前已售出139台。

H2L Selector已走出实验阶段。随着139台机器售出，用户平均评分为4.1分（满分5分），机器人病害筛选正在郁金香生产中成为主流。然而，种植者强调，广泛采用将取决于可靠性和性能的进一步改进。

《未来农业》采访了四位H2L Selector 180的用户，了解他们对这款机器人的使用体验。结论是：在5分制下平均得分4.1，他们总体上持积极态度。
contentHtml: The H2L Selector has moved beyond the experimental stage. With 139 machines sold and users giving it an average score of 4.1 out of 5, robotic disease selection is becoming mainstream in tulip production. Yet growers stress that widespread adoption will depend on further improvements in reliability and performance.
